Settings

Connection, providers, and workspace defaults.

General
Model providers
General

How otto connects to Letta, what is ready, and workspace defaults.

Connection

otto discovers Letta Desktop and your default agent automatically. Override only when discovery picks the wrong runtime.

The desktop app auto-detects the local Letta runtime and current/default agent. This web preview cannot open the Electron bridge, so manual overrides are disabled here.

Onboarding

Replay the first-run walkthrough on next launch.

Replay first-run

Clears the first-run flag so Welcome and the getting-started dock return on next launch.

Reset onboarding
Readiness

What must be true before Chat and irreversible actions unlock.

Setup required — Chat stays disabled until required items are configured. Letta runtime · Agent identity · Memory / MemFS
Show readiness detail
Memory observatory

Read-only view of Letta core-memory blocks. Writeback goes through Curation.

Open in Letta

Inspects Letta core-memory blocks via `/v1/agents/{id}/core-memory/blocks`. Otto does not write memory here — use Curation proposals for writeback.

Connect Letta in General before expecting live blocks.
Labs

Experimental paths stay off until you turn Labs on. Ship-tier surfaces work without Labs.

These change how the app behaves and may change or disappear. Nothing here affects receipt records.
Enable Labs

Labs may break or change without notice. Use on a workspace you can reset.

Knowledge (Cognee)COMING SOON

Optional recall graph sidecar for Knowledge — not required for Ship.

pgvector recallCOMING SOON

Local vector recall store — env-gated; experimental retrieval path.

Channels outboundCOMING SOON

Live outbound bot sends — contract-only until enabled.

Memory observatoryCOMING SOON

Deep memory block inspection in Settings when runtime is up.

Worker autonomous loopCOMING SOON

Ticket worker loop without manual nudge — approval-gated.

Observe loop that proposes practice updates from runs.
